feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to change a date format when exporting employee time sap successfactors
entry.content: i am trying to change the format on import and export date ( to export Employee time) from MM/DD/YYYY to DD/MM/YYYY can you kindly assist

entry.title: 1H 2024 Release Issue - Disappear the text "Select the action to perform" in Import and Export Page
entry.content: After H1 2024 release disappear text "Select the action to perform" in import and export page.

entry.title: Issue with new HRIS Element Rule Scenarios
entry.content: The new HRIS Element Business Rule Scenarios are limited to being triggered by only one Event Type. I find this very limiting, and have created a Request in Customer influence that I'm hoping others will vote for: Do not limit HRIS Element Business Rule Scenarios to be triggered by only one Event Type

entry.title: Home page approvals tile showing job title and not position title
entry.content:
Hello,

   For any Employee related workflow task, where that shows up in Quick Cards Approvals tile on the home page it is displaying Employee name and their Job title instead of Position title. Once the task is clicked, it navigates to Workflow details page and display position title correctly..

  Please let me know if this can be changed to display position title instead of job title on the home page

entry.title: Issues with Deceased status in EC & POC
entry.content:
Hi,

We have had EC and position management for several years and never had these issues with our deceased employees until about a month ago. The picklist employee-status includes a Deceased status. I do not think this is a unique set up. However, in the last month (so not release related) in Production we are facing issues and one resolution causes another issue. Conflicting KB articles with conflicting resolutions. KB article 3410318 - Unable to search inactive employees with custom employee status - Employee Central  https://me.sap.com/notes/3410318/E and KB article 3253287 - The employee is inactive with employee status in Job information as 'Deceased', but Position Org Chart is filled  https://me.sap.com/notes/3253287/E

Details on employee-status picklist non-unique external code:

If non-unique code = T

Then the POC does not show the deceased employee. Good.

But then I cannot proxy or search for some employees. Not good.

If non-unique code = T1 (or any other unique value)

Then the POC shows the deceased employee as in the position. Not good.

I can proxy and search for all employees. Good.

It has been horrible experience with SAP Support. I have two open cases and they keep saying it's not me, open a case with them, between EC team and Platform team. I have escalated one of the tickets today. It has been a month. This is just cruel. To be able to see a deceased employee (a friend to some employees) on the Position Org Chart or the regular Org Chart depending on which way I flip the non-unique external code, is horrible. I cannot fix this and have been asking for help from SAP Support and there does not seem to be any resolution. 

Is anyone else facing this?

Julie

entry.title: To take the previous pay component Amount in Appointment Letter in document generation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of my customer has this following ask to fetch the previous pay component(Basic) Amount in Appointment Letter in document generation.

In Employee Central we only have Monthly Basic pay component.

We need to maintain the same in appointment letter. Can we take the last amount of Basic pay component which was there during hire date of employee.

For eg- An employee got hired on 6 june 2021 & the BASIC was 20000. So in Appointment letter we need that 20000 amount as his BASIC Amount, not the revised details.

 

Please let us know the feasibility.

Thanks

entry.title: Unable to translate the classic view menu tab.
entry.content:
Hi experts

Tab (Goals) in Classic View of report centre cannot be translated. I downloaded the language packs but cannot find the tab name in both English and Spanish.

I used the English debug, and found that it is referred to as Objectives, yet I cannot find it in both language packs mentioned above.

When I search Objectives or Goals in text replacement, I still can't find the tab. 

I will appreciate your input.

entry.title: Is First Time Manager ()
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to build an OnChange rule that would update a custom string to help us flag new managers and design some training around that.

I've made it as so, which then would be added as a change rule to the custom field i have in jobinfo under "New Manager" - but of course i just get blank values. 

Any idea if I have made a mistake somewhere?

 

Kind regards,

Antonis

entry.title: ECT-170010 | Assignment Display Header unable to display Country of Company
entry.content:
I’m trying to get employment differentiator working in latest release H1_2024.

i found out that standard field AssignmentDisplayHeader was required

 

 

and a job in company and logo settings needed to be turned on in order to have the field populated.

 

 

Unfortunately , there is a field that can’t be displayed : Country of Company(country-of-company)

 

if we want to display the country of a company does the only way is to copy the info in a custom field ?

I’ve opened a ticket to find out : 512930/2024

entry.title: 1H 2024 SCM-19894 - Validation for Permanently Deleting Positions with Nomination Records
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are testing this release item of deleting a vacant position with successor on it. My understanding is that this error occurs only when the entire position is being deleted from the system.

But the check seems to be on every row of the position. Even if the HR tries to delete the top of the stack row on the position to correct that position, it is not allowing them to delete and throwing a popup error message stating that "You can't delete the position as it has successor nomination records".

 This enhancement is not a valid enhancement if it is not allowing the HR or admin team to delete the unwanted rows from the position.

Is any other customer facing this issue? How this can be resolved?

entry.title: Limit of Locations per Location Group
entry.content:
Does anybody know if there is a limit on the number of Locations that can be associated to one Location Group in SF Employee Central?

Thanks!

entry.title: 1H 2024 Product Release - RBP - Copy Permission Role function
entry.content: The copy permission role function no longer seems available with the latest RBP changes, is this intended?

entry.title: probation status to be auto-updated based on rule
entry.content:
Can probation status to be auto-updated based on the custom probation form completion status (Via PM module)? 

We are currently designing a probation form, i was wondering if upon the completion status of the form, can we build a business rule to trigger the probation status update within Employee Profile's employment details portlet? 

Else, it's still going to be additional manual process to change the status from employee's profile..

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Workflows stalled for longer than specific number of days
entry.content:
Hi Community!

Does anyone have an idea how a reminder could be created to workflows which are stalled for over a specific number of days? Our customer has the standard reminders scheduled for workflows, but would like to set up additional daily ones for when a workflow is stalled for over 21 days. 

I couldn't find anything about about setting up additional workflow reminders; does anyone have an experience of setting something like this up and could advise how can this be done?

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central 

Thank you

entry.title: How to show years of service on Anniversary Alert/Notification
entry.content: We are looking to display years of service in the Anniversary Alert. Is there a KBA to show us how to do this?

entry.title: How can I convert the person-id-external (Person ID) of existing employees?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

According to the SAP Help documentation here, changing the person-id-external is allowed for existing employee data.

I have two questions about this:

  • How and where can I change this person-id-external for existing employees?
  • What are the restrictions?

I have searched SAP Help and SAP Notes on this topic and found nothing.

Thank you for your help 😄

Best regards,
Andy

entry.title: New Sections on View Pending Workflows
entry.content:
Hi,

I have tried looking for details on the new sections of the new View Pending Workflows, but I cannot find what the 'Requests for Comment' and 'Requests for Information' are or where they are coming from. How and where are these set up? I'm sure my users will ask what these sections are and I do not know. Any additional information is appreciated. Thank you!

Julie

entry.title: Deprecation of the purge inactive user option- issue for new hires who never start
entry.content:
With the deprecation of the purge inactive user button that is supposed to occur in Nov (3401581 - Purge Inactive User Button is Missing from Purge Request Type) how are we supposed to purge a new hire who never starts with our organization?  It is my understanding that DRTM will NOT work for this because you have to set a retention period and the new hire who never started cannot be purged until that retention period is met? How can customers handle this situation?

Thanks

entry.title: Issues with Horizon theme in Company Structure Overview
entry.content:
With the Horizon theme being applied to the Company Structure Overview in the 1H 2024 release (WEF-133809), I see a couple of issues, as highlighted in the image below, with the before on the left and after on the right:

  1. The colors configured in "Edit Layout" for each object do not appear anywhere on the object card. These colors should either be displayed somewhere like before (my preference), or the option to set them should be removed.
  2. The new icon for Positions does not represent Positions as clearly as the old one did.

entry.title: 1H 2024 - KM18020 - Create Same-Level Position
entry.content: The below text change that is part of KM18020 is inconsistent with the item right above it. Why wouldn't the new text be "Add Same-Level Position" instead of "Create Same-Level Position"?
